# SEMDL Spec Change Checklist

- Does the request change requirements only, or also architecture boundaries?
- If architecture changes, which ADR must be added or updated?
- Which section of docs/requirements.md changes?
- Does docs/cli.ebnf change?
- Which manifest entries change in docs/examples/testcases?
- Which golden files change in docs/examples/golden/?
- Do success and failure surfaces remain symmetrical?
- Is user confirmation needed for any ambiguity?
